# Konditional LLMs Index

> Canonical docs site: https://amichne.github.io/konditional/

Konditional is a Kotlin-first, deterministic feature-flag platform.
This file provides a compact map of high-value documentation pages for LLM-based tooling.

## Start Here
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/overview/start-here/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/overview/why-typed-flags/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/overview/product-value-fit/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/overview/first-success-map/

## Quickstart
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/quickstart/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/quickstart/install/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/quickstart/define-first-flag/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/quickstart/evaluate-in-app-code/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/quickstart/add-deterministic-ramp-up/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/quickstart/load-first-snapshot-safely/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/quickstart/verify-end-to-end/

## Theory and Invariants
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/claims-registry/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/type-safety-boundaries/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/determinism-proofs/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/namespace-isolation/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/parse-dont-validate/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/atomicity-guarantees/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/migration-and-shadowing/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/theory/verified-synthesis/

## Reference
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/reference/module-dependency-map/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/reference/api-surface/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/reference/snapshot-format/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/reference/patch-format/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/reference/snapshot-load-options/
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/reference/evaluation-diagnostics/

## API Spec
- https://amichne.github.io/konditional/api/

## Repository
- https://github.com/amichne/konditional
- Docs source path: https://github.com/amichne/konditional/tree/main/docs
